## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Skills follow the structure described in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (frontmatter `name`/`description`, ordered process, verification step)
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter matches the skill directory name
- [ ] No content duplicated across skills — references used instead
- [ ] Bundled files referenced via `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}`, not hardcoded paths
- [ ] `plugin.json` version left at `1.0.0` (unless this is a deliberate paradigm shift)
- [ ] Docs updated where skills changed: `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and the `nexa-skills` index
- [ ] No references to private or third-party projects (use a neutral placeholder such as `ExampleApp`)

## Testing

How you verified the change (installed locally, invoked the command, observed output).
